title: heptapleurum mitragerum
intro: Heptapleurum mitragerum, also known as the Mitragyna or Korthals' Mitragyna, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimalarial effects. The health benefits of Heptapleurum mitragerum include its ability to relieve pain and reduce fever, as well as its potential to treat malaria and other diseases. Herbal preparations of Heptapleurum mitragerum include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
